scripts.dev: npm run build -w mf-catalog && npm run build -w mf-player && npm run build -w mf-checkout && concurrently -n catalog,player,checkout,shell -c cyan,green,yellow,blue "npm run preview -w mf-catalog" "npm run preview -w mf-player" "npm run preview -w mf-checkout" "wait-on http://localhost:40071/assets/remoteEntry.js http://localhost:40072/assets/remoteEntry.js http://localhost:40073/assets/remoteEntry.js && npm run dev -w shell"
scripts.build: npm run build -w mf-catalog && npm run build -w mf-player && npm run build -w mf-checkout && npm run build -w shell
scripts.preview: npm run preview -w mf-catalog && npm run preview -w mf-player && npm run preview -w mf-checkout && npm run preview -w shell
